full_text:
Xiang Tiao (Wenbao) 向條 (文豹)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiang Tiao (向條), styledWenbao (文豹), was born in Nan. Xiang Lang’s son, he was a man of great learning. Xiang Tiao was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
